slides.title: GPU-Accelerated Inverse Homogenization Solver
slides.description: High-performance GPU solver for designing high-resolution 3D microstructures. Optimizes 512³ ≈ 134.2 million finite elements in less than 40 seconds per iteration with only 9 GB GPU memory.

slides.title: Differentiable Microstructures Design
slides.description: Novel approach for designing 2D/3D differentiable microstructures with continuous volume fractions. Achieving bulk modulus very close to the Hashin-Shtrikman upper bound.

slides.title: Low-Melting-Point Alloys 3D Printing
slides.description: Innovative extrusion additive manufacturing strategy for fabricating complex LMPA components. First successful fabrication of very complex structures using dual-nozzle system.

slides.title: Near-Isotropic Extreme-Stiffness Metamaterials
slides.description: Three continuous 3D mechanical metamaterial sequences achieving over 98% of the Hashin-Shtrikman upper bounds. Represented by implicit neural functions for resolution-free design.

slides.title: Topology Optimization Research Overview
slides.description: Comprehensive research on topology optimization, microstructures design, and advanced manufacturing techniques. Bridging computational design and physical fabrication.
